ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or UT */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or Union Territory */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., State, Union Territory) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state or UT */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state or UT */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or UT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state it belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the district */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of crime */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Murder, Rape) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_types_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., Officer, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of crime reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was filed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the crime incident */,
  "victim_details" TEXT /* Details of the victim */,
  "accused_details" TEXT /* Details of the accused */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of crime */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported for that year */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the crime type over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports_aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "total_murder" INTEGER /* Total number of murders in the state */,
  "total_rape" INTEGER /* Total number of rapes in the state */,
  "total_kidnapping" INTEGER /* Total number of kidnappings in the state */,
  "totalIPC_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of IPC crimes in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_aggregates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident type (e.g., violent, property) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socio_economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socio-economic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the socio-economic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the socio-economic factor */,
  "effect_on_crime_rate" TEXT /* Effect of the socio-economic factor on crime rate (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime cause */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the socio-economic factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_causes_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES socio_economic_factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic factor */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic factor */,
  "effect_on_crime_rate" TEXT /* Effect of the demographic factor on crime rate (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)
